name: Kahlua Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 6 large Cooking apples, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Make pie crust: Blend 1/3 cup flour with water to form a paste. Mix remaining flour, sugar, and salt. Cut in shortening. Combine the flour paste into dough.
2. Roll out bottom crust and place in 9-inch pie plate. Spread with melted butter. Sprinkle with sugar and pecans.
3. Combine apples, Kahlua, brown sugar, and flour. Place filling into pie shell. Dot with butter.
4. Roll out remaining crust. Cut into strips.
5. Arrange lattice over apples. Brush with melted butter and sprinkle with sugar.
6. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes. Lower heat to 350°F. Continue baking for 40-45 minutes or until golden and tender. Cool slightly. Serve warm for best flavor.
